headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://unpkg.com https://www.googletagmanager.com https://plausible.io; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://api.openrouteservice.org https://plausible.io; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
headers.permissions-policy: geolocation=(self), camera=(self), microphone=(self), payment=(self), usb=(), bluetooth=(), magnetometer=(), gyroscope=(), accelerometer=()
